{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201238541351372520F664AD38CE"}"},"total":370},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7587675922284462873","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，爱看，香香。
刚正帝真的是一个合格的帝王了，对女人有感情但不多，孩子比女人重要，女主光环来了也不行，摆弄后宫女人跟玩儿似的，天老大朕老二，剩下都给我往后靠，这才是皇权啊至高无上的皇权。人人都有更好一点的平等的结局，舒服。后宫就是吃人，皇权就是压榨，那几个后院女子的离世我也会悄悄心疼，但是那些结局比甄嬛传原剧情里面的配角命运值得太多了。
我反正看不惯大胖橘那种隐藏版赘婿样儿。
风流帝，香香，我可太喜欢他那个劲儿了，只要不是大清赘婿真的感觉魅力拉满，一下就理解熟女的魅力了，看他给镯子里下毒差点以为大琵琶精要下线真的感觉他有点不是人了，但是……大琵琶精发现了那就没事了，热闹，好看，爱看，多来点。本来想着他好过分，他也不是单欺负后院的女人，发现了他就是谁都欺负，那没事了。众生平等的烂人，癫吧，癫儿好啊，如懿传值得。","text_exts":[{"e":155,"s":152,"text":"甄嬛传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177398153464AD38CE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227587675922284462873%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227528268715461184536%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":358,"s":355,"text":"如懿传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A6%82%E6%87%BF%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177398153464AD38CE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227587675922284462873%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227528268715461184536%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A6%82%E6%87%BF%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766648088,"group_id":"7528268715461184536","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2GV8BnzuZlz3ytxrwD/6AjOHMKRjtjbG6SOF2xgPCwD","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/eebadf6365cd4f1f9c60945e079725f0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533574&x-signature=dd7Y8bnPeDu%2BfFq4jCPVeY7Kdlg%3D","user_id":"3869884604497214","user_name":"•᷄ࡇ•᷅快更新啊！"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3869884604497214","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7528268715461184536","book_info":{"abstract":"（异世皇帝+单元剧+男主视角+背景板系统）
主穿《甄嬛传》《如懿传》，因每个单元都是不同的男主，性格爱好和受宠爱的妃子也会不同，主线剧情依旧为后宫佳丽，权谋含量仅1%
为方便人设剧情，皇帝性格特点参考某游《深宫曲》，共五位皇帝
1.刚正帝（甄嬛传）：原世界妈妈很爱爸不疼，妈妈一路厮杀送他上位，爱崽的妈宝男一个
2.冷漠帝（如懿传）：爸不疼妈偏心，年少登基，前有外戚想夺权后有兄弟要上位，冷漠自私重度表演型人格
3.温柔帝（甄嬛传）：爸爸爱妈妈宠，独生子，天胡开局，生来就是皇位继承人，傲慢自恋又情绪稳定的中央空调
4.风流帝（如懿传）：冷宫疯子妈，美貌但愚蠢的养妈，昏庸好色的爸，靠杀父杀兄杀弟上位的他，天生pua大师，顶级薄情人
5.阴暗帝（甄嬛传）：家族被屠，单枪匹马建王朝，疯子一个，干出什么离谱的事都很合理
避雷：每个男主都是纯正封建皇帝，直男癌晚期，有多段感情线，没有1v1情节，无记忆穿越无金手指，阴暗帝会和安陵容有CP剧情，疯批男鬼VS阴湿女鬼怎么不算双向救赎（？）呢","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/42d98b77400984f20fdbd48c37218847","author":"银耳冻雪梨","author_id":"","book_id":"7528268715461184536","book_name":"朕的后宫为何会这样？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e8e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":860,"name":"相互救赎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=860&name=相互救赎&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7528268750550745624","read_count":"16473","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"551834"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"228","tags":"女频衍生,穿越,同人,相互救赎,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a2cf193c502aa8fbec22f591d605bb12~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779165534&x-signature=VrZdtYwt6wexLtZHjPh8DywNpdU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3096701774600268","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"227"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201238541351372520F664AD38CE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13132,"r ply_count":0,"show_pv":6956},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7561158541630374680","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好。主角是有性格缺点，但塑造的很好，从他的视角来看很好。很新颖，剧情也挺好的，就是有点慢了。还有就是我看有吐槽甘氏的，我不懂。反而认为主角对甘氏的偏爱同样很吸引我。主角是人，是人就有偏好。而甘氏就是那么一个刚刚好全踩在主角点上的人。而我是个不太喜欢看全权谋或全言情的，比例刚好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760475858,"group_id":"7528268715461184536","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7kbyRA/vwiaXPmIv9M38Lc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bd13c2c44fc9407ebe6f67c48b9843c5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536778&x-signature=KXiapyVNSX8NVkSMjR4rFBXFynQ%3D","user_id":"365470260667287","user_name":"山风奶奶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"365470260667287","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7528268715461184536","book_info":{"abstract":"（异世皇帝+单元剧+男主视角+背景板系统）
